query: SELECT li.id, li.productCode, li.description, li.quantity, li.unitOfMeasure, li.costPrice, li.totalPrice, sq.projectId FROM line_items li JOIN supplier_quotes sq ON li.supplierQuoteId = sq.id JOIN suppliers s ON sq.supplierId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%ELECTRA%' AND li.unitOfMeasure = 'KM' LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ro2tCDef8YTuRV.root --database 89sPt5WznQmH7pHfxEjFRd --execute SELECT li.id, li.productCode, li.description, li.quantity, li.unitOfMeasure, li.costPrice, li.totalPrice, sq.projectId FROM line_items li JOIN supplier_quotes sq ON li.supplierQuoteId = sq.id JOIN suppliers s ON sq.supplierId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%ELECTRA%' AND li.unitOfMeasure = 'KM' LIMIT 15;
